title: Cyrsed Mod
description: A horror mod of your liking
body:
# What's special about **Cyrsed Mod**?

The **Cyrsed Mod** is designed to re-imagine horror mods in Minecraft. For this first mod, there will be listed a secondary mod "Cyrsed Mod: Herobrine", which will add Herobrine.*

# What's in the base mod?

Well, the mod is currently being updated to several versions including 1.21.1, 1.21, 1.20.6, 1.20.1, and 1.19.4. The contents of these versions currently vary, but all follow a base amount of content that is found below:
- Mobs/Entities
  - Cyrsed Zombies
    - Can be spawned at any time (with low spawn rate)
    - Resistant to day (doesn't burn)
    - Runs faster than usual zombies
    - Has a 2% spawn rate each time you hit a normal zombie
  - Fake Steve
    - Can be spawned at any time (with low spawn rate)
    - As fast as players
    - Same health as players
    - Searches for players
    - Can be found anywhere
- Other (Structures, Etc.)
  - Abandoned Hole Pillars
    - Can be generated in the plains or forest biomes
    - Habitable for living
    - Very low chance of generating

Now, I (a solo mod creator) am working on several more versions, like 1.12.2, 1.14.4, and 1.18.2.

In these newer versions (and the older ones, once updated), it will include several more mobs, structures, and horror events but will be overall way more horrifying.


_*The mod "Cyrsed Mod: Herobrine" is not yet available. However, once both pages are set up and approved, they will be linked in the description._
